items.raw_excerpt: In Norway, one of the most dangerous animals is also one of the smallest: the tick. It is important that you are aware of how to protect yourself and your family.
items.summary_en: Ticks are among the most dangerous animals in Norway despite their small size. It is important to know how to protect yourself and your family during tick season.
items.summary_ko: 노르웨이에서 가장 위험한 동물 중 하나는 작지만 진드기입니다. 진드기 시즌에는 자신과 가족을 보호하는 방법을 아는 것이 중요합니다.
items.title_en: How to protect yourself during Norway's tick season
items.title_ko: 노르웨이 진드기 시즌에서 자신을 보호하는 방법
items.title_original: EXPLAINED: How to protect yourself during Norways tick season

items.raw_excerpt: Powerball ticket sales in the United Kingdom will begin Tuesday, giving players across the Atlantic a chance at winning the same massive jackpot that U.S. players already play for.
items.summary_en: People in the United Kingdom can start buying Powerball lottery tickets on Tuesday. They will play for the same big jackpot that American players already chase. It is the first time the game crosses the Atlantic.
items.summary_ko: 영국에서 화요일부터 파워볼 복권을 살 수 있게 됐다. 미국 플레이어들이 노리는 같은 대형 잭팟에 도전할 수 있다. 대서양 건너에서 이 게임이 열리는 것은 이번이 처음이다.
items.title_en: Powerball Lottery Tickets Now Available in the UK
items.title_ko: 영국에서도 파워볼 복권 판매 시작
items.title_original: Powerball ticket sales begin Tuesday in the United Kingdom

items.raw_excerpt: Metro is set to close its last two remaining department stores in Paragon and Causeway Point malls as part of a retail overhaul, marking a significant shift in the retail giant's history.
items.summary_en: Metro is set to close its last two remaining department stores in Paragon and Causeway Point malls as part of a retail overhaul. This marks the end of an era for the retail giant that once had a strong presence on Orchard Road.
items.summary_ko: 메트로 싱가포르가 소매 개편의 일환으로 Paragon과 Causeway Point 쇼핑몰의 마지막 두 점포를 폐점합니다. 오처드로드 전성기를 누렸던 소매 대기업의 시대가 막을 내립니다.
items.title_en: Metro Singapore's history: From Hollywood-inspired name to Orchard Road heyday and final closures
items.title_ko: 메트로 싱가포르의 역사: 할리우드에서 영감을 받은 이름에서 오처드로드 전성기, 마지막 폐점까지
items.title_original: Metro Singapore's history: From Hollywood-inspired name to Orchard Road heyday and final closures

items.raw_excerpt: Auckland Council has voted in favour of a plan that could see more intensified housing in the city.
items.summary_en: Auckland Council voted to support a plan that would allow more intensive housing in the city. The plan could lead to more homes being built in the area.
items.summary_ko: 오클랜드 시의회는 도시 내 주택 밀도를 높이는 계획에 찬성 투표를 했습니다. 이 계획으로 해당 지역에 더 많은 주택이 건설될 수 있게 됩니다.
items.title_en: Auckland Council approves plan for more housing in the city
items.title_ko: 오클랜드 시의회, 도시 주택 밀도 강화 계획 승인
items.title_original: Auckland Council votes in favour of intensified housing plan

items.raw_excerpt: Researchers have copied massive quantities of publicly-available climate and environmental data from NASA onto a Swiss supercomputer to train artificial intelligence models -- and for safekeeping amid US funding cuts.
items.summary_en: Swiss scientists have copied large amounts of public NASA climate and environmental data onto a Swiss supercomputer. They want to train artificial intelligence models. They also want to keep the data safe because of US funding cuts.
items.summary_ko: 스위스 과학자들이 공개된 NASA 기후 및 환경 데이터 대량을 슈퍼컴퓨터에 복사했다. 인공지능 모델 훈련과 미국 예산 삭감에 대비한 데이터 보관이 목적이다.
items.title_en: Swiss researchers copy NASA climate data to supercomputer
items.title_ko: 스위스 연구자, NASA 기후 데이터를 슈퍼컴퓨터에 대규모 복사
items.title_original: Swiss researchers hoard vast trove of NASA climate data

items.raw_excerpt: The 108th edition of the Nijmeegse Vierdaagse, or four-day walk, kicked off at 4am on Tuesday. More than 45,000 walkers from more than 70 countries are taking part in this year’s event, with marchers covering up to 50 kilometres a day. The first day takes participants across the Waal Bridge into the Betuwe region, into the town of Elst. It is known as “Blue Tuesday” and the centre of the Elst is decorated in blue with walkers welcomed by bands...
items.summary_en: The 108th edition of the Nijmeegse Vierdaagse has officially started in Nijmegen. Over 45,000 participants from more than 70 countries will walk up to 50 kilometers a day for four days.
items.summary_ko: 니메이헨에서 제108회 4일제 보행 대회가 개막했습니다. 70개국에서 모인 4만 5천여 명의 참가자들은 매일 최대 50km를 걸으며 4일간의 여정을 시작했습니다.
items.title_en: 108th Nijmeegse Vierdaagse Walking Event Begins
items.title_ko: 제108회 니메이헨 4일제 보행 대회 개막
items.title_original: They are off: 108th edition of the Nijmeegse Vierdaagse begins

items.raw_excerpt: When two mates "sailed" a toilet barge across Backstairs Passage to Kangaroo Island, there was more to it than just having a laugh.
items.summary_en: Two friends built a barge using an old toilet. They sailed it across Backstairs Passage to Kangaroo Island. It was a funny adventure for the pair.
items.summary_ko: 두 친구가 화장실을 개조해 만든 바지선으로 항해를 떠났다. 그들은 해협을 건너 캥거루 섬에 무사히 도착했다. 이번 기발한 모험은 두 사람에게 큰 웃음을 선사했다.
items.title_en: Mates sail a toilet barge to Kangaroo Island
items.title_ko: 호주 친구들, 변기 바지선 타고 캥거루 섬으로 항해
items.title_original: 'Nautical Alby Mangels' sails toilet to Kangaroo Island on homemade barge

items.raw_excerpt: During heatwaves, there is nothing more refreshing than plunging into the (relatively) cool waters of Switzerland’s lakes. But is swimming in Alpine lakes allowed — and if so, under what conditions?
items.summary_en: During summer heatwaves, Swiss Alpine lakes offer cool relief. Swimming is generally allowed in many mountain lakes, but local rules vary by location. Visitors should check local guidelines before taking a dip.
items.summary_ko: 여름 폭염이 계속될 때, 스위스 알프스 호수는 시원한 휴식처가 됩니다. 많은 산악 호수에서 수영이 허용되지만, 지역에 따라 규칙이 다릅니다. 수영 전에 현지 지침을 확인하는 것이 좋습니다.
items.title_en: What are the rules for swimming in Swiss mountain lakes?
items.title_ko: 스위스 산악 호수에서 수영 규칙은?
items.title_original: What are the rules for swimming in Swiss mountain lakes?

items.raw_excerpt: Winning the Champions League with Greek giants Olympiacos was "one of the coolest moments" of Abby Andrews's life. She wants to use that experience to push the Stingers to the next level.
items.summary_en: Abby Andrews says winning the Champions League with Olympiacos was one of the coolest moments of her life. She wants to use that experience to push the Australian Stingers water polo team to the next level.
items.summary_ko: 아비 앤드루스는 그리스 올림피아코스와 챔피언스리그 우승을 '인생 최고의 순간' 중 하나로 꼽았다. 그녀는 그 경험을 활용해 호주 스팅어스 팀을 다음 단계로 끌어올리려 한다.
items.title_en: How this Champions League winner aims to ignite Stingers
items.title_ko: 이 챔피언스리그 우승자가 스팅어스를 어떻게 끌어올릴지
items.title_original: How this Champions League winner aims to ignite Stingers

items.raw_excerpt: Independent watchdog Transport Focus finds Kent's M20 motorway is among the most highly rated.
items.summary_en: An independent watchdog found that Kent's M20 motorway is among the most highly rated roads in England. The survey by Transport Focus ranked major roads based on driver satisfaction.
items.summary_ko: 교통 독립 감시기관이 켄트주 M20 고속도로가 영국에서 가장 높은 평가를 받은 도로 중 하나라고 밝혔습니다. 트랜스포트 포커스 조사는 운전자 만족도를 기준으로 주요 도로 순위를 매겼습니다.
items.title_en: England's best and worst major roads named in poll
items.title_ko: 영국 최고와 최악의 주요 도로 여론조사 결과 발표
items.title_original: England's best and worst major roads named in poll

items.raw_excerpt: An ultra marathon runner is going the distance fundraising for children living with disabilities so they can hopefully move more freely.
items.summary_en: An ultra marathon runner is raising money for children with disabilities. The goal is to help these children move more freely. The runner is taking on a long-distance challenge.
items.summary_ko: 마라톤 선수가 장애를 가진 아이들을 위해 기부금을 모으고 있습니다. 아이들이 더 자유롭게 움직일 수 있도록 돕는 것이 목표입니다. 선수는 장거리 마라톤에 도전하며 모금을 이어가고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Hawke's Bay runner fundraises for children living with disabilities
items.title_ko: 호크스 베이 달리기 선수, 장애 아동 돕기 모금
items.title_original: Hawke's Bay runner fundraises for children living with disabilities

items.raw_excerpt: Do kids really not feel the cold like adults do? Or are they just expressing their independence? And when should you insist?
items.summary_en: Australian parents often wonder why their children refuse to put on a warm jumper even when it is clearly freezing outside. Researchers say kids do feel the cold just like adults, but the urge to stay independent and fit in with friends wins out. The article explores when parents should stand their ground and bundle up their kids.
items.summary_ko: 호주 부모들은 밖이 추울 때 아이들이 따뜻한 옷 입기를 거부하는 것에 대해 고민하곤 합니다. 전문가에 따르면 아이들도 어른만큼 추위를 느끼지만, 스스로 하려는 마음과 친구들 눈치가 더 큰 영향을 미친다고 합니다. 부모가 어느 정도까지 강제해야 하는지도 조언을 듣습니다.
items.title_en: Kids feel the cold too. So why do they refuse to wear a jumper?
items.title_ko: 아이들도 추위를 느끼는데, 왜 스웨터를 안 입으려 할까?
items.title_original: Kids do feel the cold. So why won't they wear a jumper?

items.raw_excerpt: The BBC finds the bike was legal and supplied as part of a scheme to reduce pollution in the city.
items.summary_en: Police officers in Birmingham seized and destroyed a man's £6,000 cargo e-bike because they wrongly thought it was illegal. The bike was actually legal and had been funded by the city council to reduce pollution. The owner tried to explain the mistake, but officers did not listen, and the bike was crushed.
items.summary_ko: 버밍엄 경찰이 시민의 합법적인 화물 전동 자전거를 불법 모터바이크로 오인해 몰수 후 파기했다. 해당 자전거는 도시 대기 오염 줄이기 위한 시의회 지원 사업으로 제공된 것으로, 소유자가 경찰에 오류를 설명했으나 받아들여지지 않았다. 이 일로 소유자는 6,000파운드 상당의 자전거를 잃었고, 벌점과 벌금 통보까지 받은 상황이다.
items.title_en: Police seize and destroy man's legal e-bike in Birmingham
items.title_ko: 버밍엄 경찰, 합법적 전동 자전거를 불법 오인해 몰수·파기
items.title_original: Man's legal e-bike seized and destroyed by police

items.raw_excerpt: Ireland is one of Europe's wettest countries, so why are hundreds of thousands of people being told not to use hosepipes?
items.summary_en: Ireland is one of Europe's wettest countries, but hundreds of thousands of residents are now told not to use hosepipes. Water companies say reservoir levels are too low after a dry spell. The hosepipe ban affects gardens, car washing, and filling pools.
items.summary_ko: 아일랜드는 유럽에서 비가 가장 많은 나라 중 하나이지만, 수십만 주민에게 호스 사용 자제를 요청하고 있습니다. 가뭄으로 저수지 수위가 낮아졌기 때문입니다. 호스 사용 금지 조치는 정원, 세차, 수영장 채우기에 적용됩니다.
items.title_en: Why is rainy Ireland banning hosepipes?
items.title_ko: 비가 많은 아일랜드에서 왜 호스 사용이 금지되나
items.title_original: How can a country as wet as Ireland need hosepipe bans?

items.raw_excerpt: Natasha spent more than 14 months in hospital due to uncertainty about who should fund her complex care.
items.summary_en: Natasha spent more than 14 months in hospital due to uncertainty about who should fund her complex care. Her mother expressed tears of joy as she was finally released.
items.summary_ko: Natasha는 복잡한 치료 비용을 누가 부담해야 하는지에 대한 불확실성 때문에 14개월 넘게 병원에 있었습니다. 어머니는 딸이 마침내 퇴원하자 기쁨의 눈물을 흘렸습니다.
items.title_en: Mum's 'tears of joy' as daughter released from hospital
items.title_ko: 어머니의 '기쁨의 눈물', 딸이 퇴원하다
items.title_original: Mum's 'tears of joy' as daughter released from hospital

items.raw_excerpt: A Wellington bike shop owner has recovered more than $10,000 worth of goods by using GPS trackers in his bikes.
items.summary_en: A Wellington bike shop owner recovered more than $10,000 worth of stolen goods by using GPS trackers hidden in his bikes. The clever solution helped police locate and return the stolen merchandise. It shows how simple technology can help small business owners protect their livelihood.
items.summary_ko: 웰링턴의 한 자전거 가게 주인이 자전거에 숨긴 GPS 추적기를 이용해 1만 달러 이상의 도난품을 되찾았다. 이 기발한 해결책은 경찰이 도난품을 찾고 반환하는 데 도움이 되었다. 단순한 기술이 소상인의 삶을 지킬 수 있는 방법을 보여준다.
items.title_en: Wellington Bike Shop Owner Recovers $10,000 in Stolen Goods Using GPS Trackers
items.title_ko: 웰링턴 자전거 가게 주인, GPS 추적기로 1만 달러 이상 도난품 회복
items.title_original: Wellington bike shop owner recovers $10,000 worth of goods using GPS trackers

items.raw_excerpt: It’s been over a month since Sweden abruptly changed its citizenship requirements and applicants have already started receiving rejection letters. Several of those rejected told The Local that they now planned to move elsewhere.
items.summary_en: Sweden changed its citizenship requirements suddenly over a month ago. People who applied are now getting rejection letters. Some rejected applicants say they will move to other countries.
items.summary_ko: 스웨덴은 한 달 전 갑자기 시민권 요건을 변경했습니다. 신청자들이 현재 거절 통보를 받고 있습니다. 탈락한 일부 신청자들은 다른 나라로 이주할 계획이라고 밝혔습니다.
items.title_en: Sweden Changes Citizenship Rules, Many Applicants Rejected
items.title_ko: 스웨덴 시민권 규정 변경, 신청자 다수 탈락
items.title_original: 'Trust is broken': New Swedish citizenship rules lead to wave of rejections

items.raw_excerpt: In an effort to improve safety for train travellers and railway staff, Germany's national railway operator says it will enforce a blanket alcohol ban at all of its stations.
items.summary_en: Deutsche Bahn wants to ban alcohol at every train station in Germany. The national railway operator says the ban would improve safety for passengers and staff. No specific date has been announced yet for when the ban would take effect.
items.summary_ko: 독일 국영 철도업체 DB가 전국 모든 기차역에서의 주류 반입을 전면 금지하는 방안을 추진 중입니다. 승객과 직원의 안전을 높이기 위한 조치라고 밝혔으며, 시행 시점은 아직 정해지지 않았습니다.
items.title_en: German Railway Plans Alcohol Ban at All Train Stations
items.title_ko: 독일 철도, 전국 모든 기차역에서 주류 반입 금지 추진
items.title_original: Deutsche Bahn wants to ban alcohol at every train station in Germany

items.raw_excerpt: Applying for the health card known as the 'carte vitale' will get you free or discounted healthcare, but it will also make sure you are in the French social security system. Here's how to go about it.
items.summary_en: The carte vitale is France's health card that gives you free or discounted healthcare. You need it to be part of the French social security system. Here is how to apply for one.
items.summary_ko: 카르트 비탈은 프랑스의 건강 카드로, 무료 또는 할인된 의료 혜택을 받을 수 있습니다. 프랑스 사회보장제도에 편입되려면 이 카드가 필요합니다. 신청 방법을 안내합니다.
items.title_en: How to get a carte vitale in France and why you need one
items.title_ko: 프랑스 카르트 비탈 취득 방법과 필요한 이유
items.title_original: How to get a carte vitale in France and why you need one

items.raw_excerpt: If you're self-employed in Spain and work from home there are several expenses you can offset against tax. Find out exactly what is allowed in your case.
items.summary_en: Self-employed people in Spain who work from home can deduct certain expenses from their taxes. The article lists which home office costs are allowed under Spanish tax law. Check the full list to see what applies to your situation.
items.summary_ko: 스페인에서 자영업을 하며 재택근무하는 경우 집에서 발생하는 비용 중 일부를 세금에서 공제할 수 있습니다. 스페인 세법에 따라 어떤 비용이 허용되는지 목록으로 정리했습니다. 본인 상황에 해당하는 항목을 확인해보세요.
items.title_en: Tax deductions for remote workers in Spain
items.title_ko: 스페인 재택근무 세금 공제 안내
items.title_original: LISTED: The tax deductions if you work from home in Spain
